title: Warm Olives with Citrus & Herbs
description: Mixed olives warmed in olive oil with garlic, rosemary, lemon zest, and red pepper flakes. Ready in 10 minutes, pairs well with cheese boards and wine.

instructions.text: Rinse and drain olives. Lightly crush garlic cloves and remove skins if you want stronger garlic flavor; leave skins on for milder.
In a small skillet over low heat, combine olive oil, garlic, rosemary, lemon zest, and red pepper flakes. Warm for about 1 minute, stirring gently, until the oil is fragrant.
Add olives and stir to coat in the infused oil. Warm over low to medium-low heat for 3–5 minutes until heated through. Don't let the garlic or herbs brown — reduce heat if they start to color.
Season with black pepper. Transfer to a serving bowl and serve immediately while warm.

notes:
Citrus options: orange zest or a combination of lemon and orange adds a slightly sweeter note.

Herb swaps: thyme or oregano work as well as rosemary.

Fennel seeds: a small pinch adds a subtle savory-sweet flavor.

Bake instead: combine all ingredients in an ovenproof dish and warm at 350°F for 10–15 minutes.
